raw_consumer_statement:
In XXXX XXXX XXXX, Citibank Wayfair Credit Card sent me an email letting me know that they thought there was a fraudulent charge on my Wayfair account ( which I used only XXXX time in XXXX to purchase a vented gas heater, never for anything else ). I called in, spoke to someone in the Customer Service and then again the Fraud Dept. I let them know that it was indeed NOT my purchase as they already suspected. I was assured that they would send me a new card ( new account number too ) and they would remove the charge ( XXXX, for {$19.00} XXXX XXXX  ). I figured that was the end of that. Then I got a new XXXX Statement via email telling me I had an account balance past due. So I called them again. Discussed it with both their Cust Service & Fraud Depts and was again assured that they would remove the fraudulent charge and the Late Fee of {$42.00}, I think. I was pretty sure that would be the end of that. NOPE. Got next month 's Statement, with additional Late Fees but it appeared that they removed the Fraudulent charge ... Go figure. So I called in again. Same thing, I requested that they fix this issue and remove the Late Fees and they again assured me that it would be fixed. NOPE. Same thing now in XXXX XXXX XXXX. I've phoned them XXXX or XXXX  times now and sent them electronic messages regarding the issue which is why I'm submitting this ; I no longer believe that they will fix this issue. HELP me please. Thanks in advance. 
RE : Wayfair Citibank XXXX account.
